status_note: Tooling shipped on 2026-06-07 as scripts/export-sources-for-audit.py + scripts/verify-database-sources.py. The export script needs to run locally (it reads NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from .env.local), and the resulting lib/sources-audit-snapshot.json must be committed before the verifier can run. This placeholder will be overwritten by the verifier on first successful run.
